data.name: 辣妹連續中出
data.detailed_description:
偷看別人內褲的事被發現後，自家房子被豐臀巨乳辣妹三人組佔領了作為她們根據地，就連你也被呼來喚去隨意使喚。
雖然一個個相當任性，但在被一個個身體色到不行的她們使喚期間，你 硬了。
雖然被她們發現並遭到了羞辱，但她們卻因為久違的大雞雞而開始嘗試……大屌一發逆襲♪♪
就是狂妄的辣妹也搞不過大屌！反過來讓狂傲的母狗們成為了你的肉便器！
和一直賴在自己家裡的辣妹們像猴子一樣沒日沒夜的做愛，過上了色欲至上的縱情操逼后宮生活♪


  • 官方漢化版
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有巨乳辣妹帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。

「辣妹連續中出」由著名日本製作室 Miel所創作,並由cherry kiss正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**請注意 ***
本遊戲中所有描述和視覺表現的人物都已超過18歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中沒有使用實際的、也無法識別的未成年人。

data.short_description: 就是狂妄的辣妹也搞不過大屌！反過來讓狂傲的母狗們成為了你的肉便器！三個性感的辣妹闖入你的房子，穿著放蕩的衣服，炫耀她們粗壯的大腿、健美的肚子、巨大的奶和多汁的pp。那你為什麼要一個人打飛機？ ！ 和一直賴在自己家裡的辣妹們像猴子一樣沒日沒夜的做愛，過上了色欲至上的縱情操逼后宮生活♪
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c

  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible

data.name: Hentai Houseparty: Gyaru Gangbang
data.detailed_description:
Mea, Lily, and Yuina, are all smoking hot gyarus, who spend their free time lounging around in your house, oozing sex appeal all over the place! Deliciously tanned skin, makeup on point, not to mention their impeccable proportions! With Mea pressing those heaving tits up against you, Lily's endless cleavage tempting you 24/7, and the golden brown absolute territory between Yuina's tights and skirt, you'll have plenty of fap material for sure. But why should you be left with only your hands for company when a treasure trove of lewd delights is in the next room!

Kick this Hentai House Party into overdrive, with an all-out Gyaru Gangbang! Teach these sluts not to underestimate you and your dick, as you turn these bitchy unwelcome guests into your own personal collection of Gyaru brand onaholes!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • All the Gyarus are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Plenty of sexy fun taking each gyaru for a ride!

Hentai Houseparty: Gyaru Gangbang Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
